game_name: Tiny Toon Adventures: Buster Busts Loose!

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Health System
special_mechanics.description: Buster collects health containers (hearts) throughout levels. Container count resets after each level. Hard mode (Challenge) starts with only one container.

special_mechanics.name: Difficulty-based Level Scaling
special_mechanics.description: Levels are significantly smaller in easy mode (Children difficulty). Fifth level is removed entirely in easy mode.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Sources contain gameplay description and level design information but no documented physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system details. Game focuses on level design variation and difficulty modes rather than technical physics documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Tiny Toon Adventures: Buster Busts Loose!
